de: Meteorologie warnt: Schnee, Frost und Sturm kommen. Der Wettervorhersageexperte der Generaldirektion Meteorologie, Abdullah Macit, warnte die Bürger vor einer neuen Regenwetterwelle, bei der die Temperaturen im ganzen Land unter die saisonalen Normen fallen werden.
title: Meteoroloji uyardı: Kar, zirai don, fırtına geliyor
description: Meteoroloji Genel Müdürlüğü Hava Tahmin Uzmanı Abdullah Macit, ülke genelinde sıcaklıkların mevsim normallerinin altına düşeceği yeni bir yağışlı hava dalgasına karşı vatandaşları uyardı.
en: Meteorology warned: Snow, frost and storm are coming. General Directorate of Meteorology Weather Forecast Expert Abdullah Macit warned citizens against a new wave of rainy weather in which temperatures across the country will drop below seasonal norms.
la: Meteorologia monuit: Nives, pruinae et procellae veniunt. Praeses Generalis Meteorologiae Tempestas Praedictio Peritus Abdullah Macit cives monuit contra novam tempestatem pluviae in qua temperaturas per patriam infra normas temporis temporis decidet.
content:
Kuzey kesimlerinde etkili olması beklenen zirai don, yarın akşam saatlerinden itibaren başlayacak.

de: Während wir auf den Frühling warteten, kam der Winter zurück: Schnee, Schauer und Frost zugleich. Nach den neuesten Vorhersagen der Meteorologie wird es in ganz Türkiye regnerisch und kalt sein. In den östlichen Regionen gibt es starke Regenfälle, in den inneren Regionen Frost und Vereisung und in den höheren Lagen besteht Lawinengefahr. Die Temperaturen bleiben unter den saisonalen Normen.
title: Bahar beklerken kış geri geldi: Kar, sağanak ve don bir arada
description: Meteoroloji’nin son tahminlerine göre Türkiye genelinde yağışlı ve soğuk hava etkili olacak. Doğu bölgelerinde kuvvetli yağış, iç kesimlerde don ve buzlanma, yükseklerde ise çığ riski dikkat çekiyor. Sıcaklıklar mevsim normallerinin altında seyredecek.
en: While we were waiting for spring, winter came back: Snow, showers and frost all together. According to the latest forecasts of Meteorology, rainy and cold weather will be effective throughout Türkiye. There is heavy rainfall in the eastern regions, frost and icing in the inner regions, and avalanche risk in the higher altitudes. Temperatures will remain below seasonal norms.
la: Dum ver exspectamus, hiems rediit: nix, imbres, frigora omnia simul. Secundum recentissimas praedictas Meteorologiae tempestates pluviae et frigoris per Türkiye efficaces erunt. Pluuiae pluviae in regionibus orientalibus, gelu et vico in interioribus regionibus sunt, et in altioribus altitudinibus periculum NIVIS. Temperatura infra normas temporis manebit.
content: Meteoroloji Genel Müdürlüğü’nün son değerlendirmelerine göre Türkiye genelinde hava durumu parçalı ve çok bulutlu seyredecek. Özellikle ülkenin kuzey, iç ve doğu bölgelerinde yağışlar etkili olacak. … [+2981 chars]

de: Aufeinanderfolgende Erdbeben in Antalya! Last-Minute-Erklärung von AFAD. Vor der Küste des Bezirks Demre in Antlya ereignete sich ein Erdbeben der Stärke 4,7. Eine kurzfristige Stellungnahme zum Erdbeben kam von AFAD. Das Erdbeben war auch in einigen umliegenden Bezirken wie Finike und Kumluca zu spüren.
title: Antalya'da peş peşe depremler! AFAD'dan son dakika açıklaması
description: Antlya'nın Demre ilçesi açıklarında 4,7 büyüklüğünde deprem meydana geldi. AFAD'dan depreme ilişkin son dakika açıklaması geldi. Deprem, Finike ve Kumluca gibi bazı çevre ilçelerde de hissedildi.
en: Successive earthquakes in Antalya! Last minute statement from AFAD. A 4.7 magnitude earthquake occurred off the coast of Antlya's Demre district. Last minute statement regarding the earthquake came from AFAD. The earthquake was also felt in some surrounding districts such as Finike and Kumluca.
la: Motus successivi in ​​Antalya! Novissima editio ex AFAD. A 4.7 terrae motus in litore Antlyae regio Demre factus est. Novissima editio de terrae motu ab AFAD orta est. Terrae motus etiam in quibusdam regionibus circumiectis sicut Finike et Kumluca sentiebatur.
content:
Antalya'nn Demre ilçesi açklarnda 5 dakika arayla 3.5 ve 4.7 büyüklüünde iki deprem meydana geldi.

de: Einige Städte in Türkiye waren mit Wüstenstaub bedeckt: Es regnete Schlamm. Der aus Nordafrika stammende Wüstenstaub war in den südlichen Provinzen der Türkei wirksam; In Mersin, Adana, Hatay, Osmaniye und Antalya waren Fahrzeuge und Straßen mit Schlamm bedeckt.
title: Türkiye’de bazı şehirler çöl tozuna büründü: Çamur yağdı
description: Kuzey Afrika kaynaklı çöl tozları, Türkiye’nin güney illerinde etkili oldu; Mersin, Adana, Hatay, Osmaniye ve Antalya’da araçlar ve caddeler çamurla kaplandı.
en: Some cities in Türkiye were covered in desert dust: It rained mud. Desert dust originating from North Africa was effective in the southern provinces of Türkiye; Vehicles and streets were covered with mud in Mersin, Adana, Hatay, Osmaniye and Antalya.
la: Quaedam civitates in Türkiye pulvere deserto opertae sunt: ​​luto pluit. Deserti pulvis ex Africa Septentrionali oriundus efficax fuit in provinciis Türkiye meridionalibus; Vehicula et plateae in Mersin, Adana, Hatay, Osmaniye et Antalya caeno obducta sunt.

A critical 'yellow code' warning came from Meteorology, the Ministry of Internal Affairs and AFAD for 24 provinces. On Thursday, April 2, storms and heavy showers will be effective from Ankara to Antalya, from Izmir to the earthquake zone. Here are the provinces at risk, region by region...

Die Iovis, die 2 mensis Aprilis, procellae et imbres ab Ancyra ad Antalyam, ab Smyrna usque ad zonam motus efficient. Hic periculo provinciae sunt, regiones per regiones.

de: Meteorologie warnt von Provinz zu Provinz: Starker Regen, Schnee und Staubtransport stehen vor der Tür! Die Meteorologie gab bekannt, dass heute im ganzen Land teilweise und sehr bewölktes Wetter und zeitweise Regenfälle zu erwarten sind. Es besteht eine Warnung vor starken Regenfällen in den Küstenprovinzen der Ägäis, im Mittelmeerraum und in den östlichen Provinzen, Schnee in Ostanatolien und Staubtransport im östlichen Mittelmeerraum und im Südosten.
title: Meteoroloji il il uyardı: Şiddetli yağış, kar ve toz taşınımı kapıda!

en: Meteorology warned from province to province: Heavy rain, snow and dust transport are at the door! Meteorology announced that partly and very cloudy weather and intermittent rains are expected throughout the country today. There is a warning for heavy rainfall in the coastal Aegean, Mediterranean and eastern provinces, snow in Eastern Anatolia, and dust transport in the Eastern Mediterranean and the Southeast.

Monetur de pluviis gravibus in provinciis maritimis Aegaeo, Mediterraneo et Orientali, nivibus in Anatolia orientali, et in onerariis pulveris in Mediterraneo Orientali et Meridiano.

de: Kritische Warnung des Innenministeriums: Die Gefahr des Code-Gelb steht vor der Tür. The Ministry of Internal Affairs issued a "yellow" coded meteorological warning for the provinces of Izmir, Aydın, Muğla, Diyarbakır, Batman, Siirt, Şırnak, Hakkari and Bitlis due to heavy rain and dust transport. Citizens are exposed to risks such as floods, floods and reduced visibility...

de: Das schnell wachsende „Smart Hospital“ in Siirt ist zu Ende. Das Nebengebäude des Trainings- und Forschungskrankenhauses mit 400 Betten in Siirt wird mit fortschrittlichen automatischen Feuerlöschsystemen, einer langlebigen, mit Erdbebenisolatoren verstärkten Struktur und einem „Smart Hospital“-Modell gebaut.
title: Siirt'te hızla yükselen "akıllı hastane"de sona gelindi
description: Siirt'te 400 yataklı Eğitim ve Araştırma Hastanesi ek binası, yangına karşı gelişmiş otomatik söndürme sistemleri, deprem izolatörleriyle güçlendirilmiş dayanıklı yapısı ve "akıllı hastane" modeliyle inşa ediliyor.
en: The rapidly rising "smart hospital" in Siirt has come to an end. The 400-bed Training and Research Hospital annex building in Siirt is being built with advanced automatic fire extinguishing systems, durable structure reinforced with earthquake isolators and a "smart hospital" model.

de: Die Meteorologie warnte: Der Himmel wird durchbohrt, der Wind wird wehen. Während nach dem Scheinfrühling im ganzen Land mit starken Regenfällen im ganzen Land zu rechnen ist, werden vor allem im Norden des Marmarameers, in der Ägäis, im Mittelmeer und in Zentralanatolien starke Winde erwartet. Hier ist die Wettervorhersage von Meteorology für Donnerstag, den 2. April 2026.

While heavy rainfall is expected throughout the country after the false spring seen in the country, strong winds are expected especially in the north of Marmara, the Aegean, the Mediterranean and Central Anatolia. Here is Meteorology's weather forecast for Thursday, April 2, 2026.

Hic tempestatum meteorologicorum praecognoscendum est Iovis, die 2 Aprilis, 2026 .

Die Meteorologie kündigte an, dass starke Regenfälle im Land wirksam sein würden, und warnte vor Niederschlägen in Form von Überschwemmungen, Überschwemmungen, Blitzen und Schlamm. Während an der Küste der Ägäis Windgeschwindigkeiten von bis zu 80 Kilometern pro Stunde erwartet werden, wurde eine Staubtransportwarnung herausgegeben.

en: Desert dust is coming! Meteorology warned 31 provinces with a code yellow: It will officially rain mud. Meteorology announced that heavy rains would be effective in the country and warned against precipitation in the form of floods, floods, lightning and mud. While the wind is expected to reach 80 kilometers per hour in the coastal Aegean, a dust transport warning has been issued.
